ground_truth.title: Catering Tips for a Successful Event | Giordano's Catering
ground_truth.author: Blake Trahan
ground_truth.main_content: Planning an event involves many details, and food is one of the most important. Whether it's a corporate gathering, wedding or party, the right menu that caters to diners' preferences and aligns with your event theme can make a lasting impression. Hiring a professional caterer is a smart choice to ensure your guests enjoy excellent food, seamless service and a stress-free experience. Why Choose Catering? Catering takes the stress out of planning and serving food. Professionals handle everything from setup to service, so you can focus on your guests. A professional caterer knows how to deliver well-prepared, flavorful meals made with fresh ingredients that are presented beautifully. Catering companies typically offer a wide range of options and are willing to work with you to create foods that fit your event. Catering for Various Events: Catering enhances any type of event, from quick business meetings to social gatherings or larger corporate functions. For quick business meetings, simple and easy-to-eat foods work best, such as box-style lunches, finger foods and salads. Larger business gatherings may require appetizers, starter courses and pasta dishes. Social events like birthdays, anniversary parties, wedding receptions and family reunions often work well with pizza, sandwiches, pasta or buffet-style options. Hiring a Catering Service: Clear communication is essential when hiring a catering service to ensure everything runs smoothly. Information to provide your caterer includes headcount, event vibe, budget and location. Food quantity estimates vary by meal type: appetizers only (six to 12 pieces per person), breakfast (five-ounce entrée per person), lunch (five-ounce entrée per person), and dinner (five- to seven-ounce entrée per person). Catering FAQ: Many catering services can accommodate common food allergies or special diets. Gratuity policies vary by caterer, so ask about it upfront. Caterers generally provide their own serving dishes, plates and utensils. Pricing is typically broken down by per-person rates with potential additional fees for delivery or setup. Reserve catering services as soon as possible, as dates fill up quickly. Feed the Crowd With Giordano's: Choosing the right catering service will make all the difference in your event's success. Giordano's is one of the top catering companies in Chicago, and we can cater all of your events, from small business gatherings to large events. We offer a variety of meals, from pizza to Italian specialties, sandwiches, salads, starters and more.
